name: mobile-automation-wdio-appium
description: Automação de testes mobile usando WebdriverIO, Appium e Mocha

scripts.test:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('allure-results', {recursive: true, force: true})" && npm test
scripts.test:clean:spec: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('allure-results', {recursive: true, force: true})" && wdio run wdio.conf.js --spec
scripts.allure:clean: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('allure-results', {recursive: true, force: true}) && console.log('✓ allure-results limpo!')"
scripts.allure:report: npm run allure:generate && npm run allure:open
